name: CBF Macro Bot
description: Record gameplay in Practice Mode and play it back in Normal Mode. Leverages GD 2.2081's built-in Click Between Frames and deterministic RNG. Ships with a frame-rate-independent speedhack with dynamic physics polling (up to 24 kHz) for choppy-free slow-motion.

auto-record.name: Auto-record in Practice Mode
auto-record.description: Automatically start recording when entering Practice Mode.

auto-stop-at-end.name: Auto-stop at level end
auto-stop-at-end.description: Stops recording when the level is completed.

default-speed.name: Default speedhack speed
default-speed.description: Default speed multiplier for the built-in frame-independent speedhack (0.001x to 1000x).

max-physics-rate.name: Max physics polling rate (Hz)
max-physics-rate.description: Maximum physics ticks per second. Higher values enable smoother slow-motion at the cost of CPU. 240 = CBF default (smooth down to ~0.1x). 24000 = smooth down to ~0.001x.

practice-fix-enabled.name: Enable practice bug fix
practice-fix-enabled.description: Forces GD's deterministic replay RNG seed so physics in Practice Mode matches Normal Mode.

use-builtin-cbf.name: Use GD built-in Click Between Frames
use-builtin-cbf.description: Enable GD 2.2081's native m_clickBetweenSteps for sub-frame input precision. Disable to fall back to per-frame ticks.

save-folder.name: Macro save folder
save-folder.description: Subfolder inside the mod's save directory where macros are stored.

syzzi.click_between_frames.description: Optional: enables enhanced sub-frame tick precision beyond GD's built-in CBF.
